A pack that is available for purchase in the [[Events#Badge_Shop|Badge Shop]] for 400 {{RewardIconWithLink|Badge}}s.

A pack of valuable items that assist you in conquering the formidable Demon Gods!

* {{RewardIconWithGearlink|orange|Material|Blasphemy Eye}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|Glue, +100}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +50k}}

[[Category:Reward Pack]]
